cms.task_text: Kód kreslí čtverec, ale [hlp]chybí spuštění pera[/hlp]. Přidejte blok pro spuštění pera před smyčku.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
